content: Recovered from timeout. Retrying with increased timeout of 45s.
Recovered from rate limit. Backed off with exponential delay.
Recovered from malformed JSON. Extracted valid JSON from response.
Recovered from empty response. Sent a follow-up prompt.
Recovered from prompt injection. Input sanitized and retried.
Recovered from model refusal. Rephrased the request.
Recovered from checkpoint corruption. Rebuilt from last valid snapshot.
